title: Intense Crispy German Rice Stick Noodles
description: A sour and crispy quick-fix German dish featuring rice stick noodles and a sweet glaze, Whole30-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice stick noodles according to package instructions.
Drain the noodles and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together apple cider vinegar, coconut aminos, honey, sesame oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the cooked noodles to the bowl and toss to combine with the glaze.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the noodles.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
Optional: garnish with chopped green onions or sesame seeds.
